p.seg: To all sons of Holy Mother Church both present and to come, Alan son of Walter, steward of the lord king of the Scots, sends greeting.

Know me to have granted, and by this charter to have confirmed, to God and the church of St Mary at Melrose, and to the monks in that place serving God, the whole land that they hold of Richard Wallace, that is Barmuir and Godenech, by the same boundaries that are contained in the charter of the same Richard, which they have concerning the same land, so that whatever was within the same boundaries they may have and possess for ever as freely and quitely and honourably as any alms is freely, quitely and honourably possessed in the kingdom of the king of the Scots. And I and my heirs shall maintain and warrant to them the same land against all men for ever. Saving my service from Richard himself.

With these witnesses: the lord Jocelin, bishop of Glasgow; Richard, abbot of Dryburgh; Elias the bishop's nephew; Walter the bishop's clerk; Richard Malebisse; Elias the bishop's brother; William Passelew; Peter of Corrie.
